chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 61 of 2012 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders on CMA 895/2014. 17.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Taseer, advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. This reference is pending since 2012 without any significant progress. Even today a brief is being held and adjournment has been sought on behalf of the applicant without any cogent reason or justification whatsoever; therefore, the instant reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
